patch:
diff --git b/loangen-agent/agent/context_builder.py a/loangen-agent/agent/context_builder.py
index 3fedb80..c3d0fbf 100644
--- b/loangen-agent/agent/context_builder.py
+++ a/loangen-agent/agent/context_builder.py
@@ -260,14 +260,14 @@ class ContextBuilder:
         missing_keys = context.get("missing_sources", [])
 
         # Which required sources are actually missing?
-        missing_required = [k for k in required if k not in missing_keys]
+        missing_required = [k for k in required if k in missing_keys]
         if not missing_required:
             return None   # All required data is available — proceed normally
 
         # Build the response structure
         missing_sources = [SOURCE_META[k] for k in missing_required if k in SOURCE_META]
 
-        connected_keys = [k for k in ["credit", "bank", "quickbooks"] if k in missing_keys]
+        connected_keys = [k for k in ["credit", "bank", "quickbooks"] if k not in missing_keys]
         connected_names = [SOURCE_META[k]["label"] for k in connected_keys if k in SOURCE_META]
 
         # Describe what can and can't be analysed
diff --git b/loangen-agent/agent/core/config.py a/loangen-agent/agent/core/config.py
index bc1b12e..2734229 100644
--- b/loangen-agent/agent/core/config.py
+++ a/loangen-agent/agent/core/config.py
@@ -348,7 +348,7 @@ class Settings(BaseSettings):
     # When true, ``personal_credit`` chat enrichment loads the latest raw credit
     # JSON from Mongo (credit_reports, then raw_credit_reports) and attaches the
     # full payload to the user message for the LLM. Does not mutate session context.
-    chat_enrichment_refresh_credit_from_raw_db: bool = False
+    chat_enrichment_refresh_credit_from_raw_db: bool = True
 
     # Max characters of serialized raw credit JSON injected into chat (0 = no limit).
     chat_credit_report_json_max_chars: int = 0
diff --git b/loangen-agent/agent/pipeline.py a/loangen-agent/agent/pipeline.py
index b6199f9..6f3c157 100644
--- b/loangen-agent/agent/pipeline.py
+++ a/loangen-agent/agent/pipeline.py
@@ -206,7 +206,7 @@ class LoanGenPipeline:
             )
 
         # Some connected
-        if connected is not None:
+        if connected:
             connected_str = ", ".join(connected)
             missing_str   = " and ".join(missing) if missing else ""
             base = f"Welcome! I have access to your {connected_str}."
@@ -233,7 +233,7 @@ class LoanGenPipeline:
         """Detect the user's intent from their message."""
         message_lower = message.lower().strip()
 
-        for intent, patterns in sorted(INTENT_PATTERNS.items()):
+        for intent, patterns in INTENT_PATTERNS.items():
             for pattern in patterns:
                 if re.search(pattern, message_lower):
                     return intent
@@ -721,7 +721,7 @@ class LoanGenPipeline:
         for pattern in amount_patterns:
             match = re.search(pattern, message, re.IGNORECASE)
             if match:
-                raw = match.group(1).replace(",", "").replace(".", "")
+                raw = match.group(1).replace(",", "")
                 amount = float(raw)
                 if "k" in pattern.lower() or "thousand" in pattern:
                     amount *= 1_000
test_patch:
diff --git a/loangen-agent/tests/test_chat_pipeline_seams.py b/loangen-agent/tests/test_chat_pipeline_seams.py
new file mode 100644
index 0000000..815a145
--- /dev/null
+++ b/loangen-agent/tests/test_chat_pipeline_seams.py
@@ -0,0 +1,226 @@
+"""Public-seam behavior for the loanGen chat pipeline.
+
+These exercise the conversation pipeline the way the chat/voice front ends do:
+intent detection and its precedence when a message matches more than one topic,
+loan-amount extraction behind the qualification path, the connected-vs-missing
+data logic in the contextual greeting, the missing-data response the applicant
+flow renders when a required source is not linked, and the enrichment default
+that decides whether a user's full credit report is loaded for credit
+questions. None of these paths is covered elsewhere in the suite, so a
+regression in any of them stays green everywhere else. The cases below feed the
+specific inputs that trip the current bugs — inputs the rest of the suite (and
+casual round-number spot checks) never hit.
+"""
+
+from __future__ import annotations
+
+import asyncio
+import unittest
+from unittest.mock import patch
+
+from agent.context_builder import ContextBuilder
+from agent.core.config import settings
+from agent.pipeline import LoanGenPipeline
+
+
+def _run(coro):
+    return asyncio.run(coro)
+
+
+class _FakeContextBuilder:
+    """Typed stand-in for ContextBuilder that records the qualification kwargs
+    the pipeline computes, so a test can read the extracted loan amount without
+    running the real prompt assembly. Every attribute is explicit — no Mock."""
+
+    def __init__(self) -> None:
+        self.qualification_calls: list[dict] = []
+
+    def build_qualification_prompt(self, context, *, desired_loan_type,
+                                   desired_amount, loan_purpose=""):
+        self.qualification_calls.append(
+            {
+                "loan_type": desired_loan_type,
+                "amount": desired_amount,
+                "loan_purpose": loan_purpose,
+            }
+        )
+        return f"QUAL loan_type={desired_loan_type} amount={desired_amount}"
+
+
+class TestLoanAmountExtraction(unittest.TestCase):
+    """The amount a borrower names must reach the qualification prompt intact —
+    including fractional figures, not just round numbers. Asserted through the
+    public enrich_user_message seam (the extractor itself is internal)."""
+
+    def _amount_for(self, message: str) -> float:
+        fake = _FakeContextBuilder()
+        pipeline = LoanGenPipeline(fake)
+        pipeline._conversation_context = {}
+        _run(pipeline.enrich_user_message(message, identifier="u-1", use_user_id=True))
+        self.assertTrue(
+            fake.qualification_calls,
+            f"qualification enrichment was not produced for {message!r}",
+        )
+        return fake.qualification_calls[-1]["amount"]
+
+    def test_fractional_thousands_amount(self) -> None:
+        # "$2.5k" is 2,500 — the fractional part must not be dropped.
+        self.assertEqual(self._amount_for("Do I qualify for a $2.5k loan?"), 2_500.0)
+
+    def test_fractional_millions_amount(self) -> None:
+        self.assertEqual(self._amount_for("Can I get a $1.5m loan?"), 1_500_000.0)
+
+    def test_round_thousands_amount(self) -> None:
+        # Control: a round "$5k" is already handled correctly.
+        self.assertEqual(self._amount_for("Am I eligible for a $5k loan?"), 5_000.0)
+
+    def test_round_millions_amount(self) -> None:
+        # Control.
+        self.assertEqual(self._amount_for("Do I qualify for $3m in financing?"), 3_000_000.0)
+
+    def test_plain_dollar_amount(self) -> None:
+        # Control: a bare "$50,000" carries no unit and no fractional part.
+        self.assertEqual(self._amount_for("Approved for a $50,000 term loan?"), 50_000.0)
+
+
+class TestIntentPrecedence(unittest.TestCase):
+    """When a message matches patterns for more than one topic, the more
+    specific personalised-data topic must win over the generic coaching topic."""
+
+    def setUp(self) -> None:
+        self.pipeline = LoanGenPipeline(_FakeContextBuilder())
+
+    def test_credit_score_trend_is_personal_credit(self) -> None:
+        self.assertEqual(
+            self.pipeline.detect_intent("Show me my credit score trend"),
+            "personal_credit",
+        )
+
+    def test_dscr_question_is_qb_financials(self) -> None:
+        self.assertEqual(
+            self.pipeline.detect_intent("What's my DSCR?"), "qb_financials"
+        )
+
+    def test_utilization_stays_personal_credit(self) -> None:
+        # Control: only one topic matches, so routing is unambiguous.
+        self.assertEqual(
+            self.pipeline.detect_intent("my credit utilization"), "personal_credit"
+        )
+
+    def test_cash_flow_stays_bank_cashflow(self) -> None:
+        # Control: bank cash-flow must keep winning over generic coaching.
+        self.assertEqual(
+            self.pipeline.detect_intent("what's my cash flow?"), "bank_cashflow"
+        )
+
+
+class TestIntentDrivenEnrichment(unittest.TestCase):
+    """A credit question must reach the personal-credit enrichment branch and
+    surface the user's credit snapshot — the observable effect of routing."""
+
+    def test_credit_question_yields_credit_snapshot(self) -> None:
+        fake = _FakeContextBuilder()
+        pipeline = LoanGenPipeline(fake)
+        pipeline._conversation_context = {
+            "credit_personal": {
+                "fico_score": 712,
+                "bureau": "Experian",
+                "credit_utilization": 30,
+            }
+        }
+        # Force the session-snapshot branch regardless of the DB-refresh default
+        # so this isolates routing, not the enrichment source.
+        with patch.object(
+            settings, "chat_enrichment_refresh_credit_from_raw_db", False
+        ):
+            enrichment, _missing = _run(
+                pipeline.enrich_user_message(
+                    "Show me my credit score trend",
+                    identifier="u-1",
+                    use_user_id=True,
+                )
+            )
+        self.assertIsNotNone(enrichment)
+        self.assertIn("712", enrichment)
+
+
+class TestContextualGreeting(unittest.TestCase):
+    """The greeting must be right across the full range of connection states,
+    including the extremes (nothing linked, everything linked)."""
+
+    def setUp(self) -> None:
+        self.pipeline = LoanGenPipeline(_FakeContextBuilder())
+
+    def test_no_sources_connected_greeting(self) -> None:
+        # A brand-new user with nothing linked must get the advisor intro, not
+        # a "here's what I can see" message about data that isn't there.
+        greeting = self.pipeline.get_greeting(
+            {"has_credit": False, "has_bank": False, "has_qb": False}
+        )
+        self.assertIn("loanGen AI Advisor", greeting)
+
+    def test_one_connected_greeting(self) -> None:
+        # Control: the common partial case is handled correctly.
+        greeting = self.pipeline.get_greeting(
+            {"has_credit": True, "has_bank": False, "has_qb": False}
+        )
+        self.assertIn("Credit Report", greeting)
+        self.assertIn("Bank Account", greeting)
+
+    def test_two_connected_greeting(self) -> None:
+        # Control.
+        greeting = self.pipeline.get_greeting(
+            {"has_credit": True, "has_bank": True, "has_qb": False}
+        )
+        self.assertIn("Financial Data", greeting)
+
+    def test_all_connected_greeting(self) -> None:
+        # Control.
+        greeting = self.pipeline.get_greeting(
+            {"has_credit": True, "has_bank": True, "has_qb": True}
+        )
+        self.assertIn("full financial profile", greeting)
+
+
+class TestMissingDataResponse(unittest.TestCase):
+    """When an intent needs a source the user has not linked, the response must
+    name the unlinked source as missing and the linked ones as connected."""
+
+    def setUp(self) -> None:
+        self.cb = ContextBuilder()
+
+    def test_missing_source_is_the_unlinked_required_one(self) -> None:
+        resp = self.cb.get_missing_data_response(
+            {"missing_sources": ["quickbooks"]}, "qualification"
+        )
+        self.assertIsNotNone(resp)
+        self.assertEqual(
+            [s["label"] for s in resp["missing_sources"]], ["QuickBooks"]
+        )
+
+    def test_connected_sources_exclude_the_missing_one(self) -> None:
+        resp = self.cb.get_missing_data_response(
+            {"missing_sources": ["quickbooks"]}, "qualification"
+        )
+        self.assertEqual(
+            resp["connected_sources"], ["Credit Report", "Bank Account"]
+        )
+
+    def test_no_response_when_no_required_source_missing(self) -> None:
+        # qualification needs credit + quickbooks; only bank is missing here.
+        resp = self.cb.get_missing_data_response(
+            {"missing_sources": ["bank"]}, "qualification"
+        )
+        self.assertIsNone(resp)
+
+
+class TestCreditEnrichmentDefault(unittest.TestCase):
+    """Credit questions must load the user's full credit report by default; the
+    thin session summary is only a fallback."""
+
+    def test_db_credit_enrichment_enabled_by_default(self) -> None:
+        self.assertTrue(settings.chat_enrichment_refresh_credit_from_raw_db)
+
+
+if __name__ == "__main__":
+    unittest.main()
